name: l1_per_row_lga_cv
notes: Paired walk-forward CV vs Phase 4 broadcast (50 cols: 15 base + 35 LGA broadcast); 14 folds; seed=42; train_min_days=1825; val_days=90; step_days=90; L1=16 cols (15 base + 1 per-row days_since_my_lga_trough); per-row col derived from existing broadcast cols (exact equivalent — broadcast value for each row's stations.council); headline holdout_logloss is L1 mean across folds (0.3405); Phase 4 mean=0.3166; Δ_L1-P4_median=+0.0124; Δ_mean=+0.0239 (skewed by fold 3 Ukraine-spike +0.1358); Δ_std=0.0425; L1 better 4/14; worse 10/14; regressions beyond 3σ seed band (+0.0225) at folds 3 (+0.1358) 4 (+0.0877) 9 (+0.0403) 12 (+0.0437) 13 (+0.0240); decision: L1-worse branch — broadcast LGA cols carry cross-entity signal a single per-row col cannot replicate; do NOT proceed to B1 reflexively; experiment artifacts (run_cv.py; smoke.py; per-fold results.csv) at SHA acb8cfa via closed PR #181.
